UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 709 GEARY STREET LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIDER, JOSEPH NUNN, BRENAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 709 GEARY STREET, #406 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 709 GEARY STREET LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RIDER, JOSEPH NUNN, BRENAN DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
